name: Cloudflare R2
description: Cloudflare R2 — S3-compatible object storage with no egress fees. Bucket-scoped REST endpoints with AWS SigV4 request signing against <account_id>.r2.cloudflarestorage.com. Region is fixed to 'auto'. Generate R2 API tokens at dash.cloudflare.com → R2 → Manage R2 API Tokens; the token gives you the access_key_id + secret_access_key pair this integration expects.

credential_fields.name: account_id
credential_fields.label: Cloudflare Account ID
credential_fields.description: 32-char hex account id from the Cloudflare dashboard sidebar. Determines the R2 endpoint used to reach your buckets.

credential_fields.name: access_key_id
credential_fields.label: R2 Access Key ID
credential_fields.description: From dash.cloudflare.com → R2 → Manage R2 API Tokens → Create API token. Scope to the bucket(s) the app will use; 'Object Read & Write' is the minimum for backup-style workloads.

credential_fields.name: secret_access_key
credential_fields.label: R2 Secret Access Key
credential_fields.description: Returned alongside the access key when you create the R2 API token. Shown once at creation; if you've lost it, generate a fresh token.

credential_fields.name: region
credential_fields.label: Region
credential_fields.description: R2 doesn't use AWS-style regions; set to 'auto' (the default). Override only if a future R2 release exposes regional endpoints.

tools.name: list_objects
tools.description: List objects in a bucket (S3-compatible ListObjectsV2). Returns XML; parse Contents[].Key / Size / LastModified, plus IsTruncated + NextContinuationToken for pagination.

prefix.description: Filter to keys starting with this prefix.

continuation-token.description: Pagination cursor from a prior IsTruncated response.

tools.name: put_object
tools.description: Upload an object. Pass the object content as the 'body' input — the runner sends it verbatim with SigV4-signed integrity hash. R2 has no upload size limit comparable to S3 but the integration runner caps responses at 200MB; for objects larger than ~100MB consider multipart upload via a future tool.

body.description: Object content. Bytes welcome — the runner sends them verbatim.

tools.name: get_object
tools.description: Download an object. Response body is the raw object bytes (response cap 200MB).

tools.name: delete_object
tools.description: Delete a single object. Returns 204 on success.

tools.name: list_buckets
tools.description: List all R2 buckets in the account. Returns XML; ListAllMyBucketsResult.Buckets.Bucket[] has the names + creation dates.
